label: master-audit-tier1
topWin: Pulled the Public Operating Surface off the homepage and turned IGNIS from an opaque number into a published narrative — two moves that resolve a brand/soul drift the site had been quietly tolerating.
topGap: Multiple Tier 1 items remain HAR-blocked on CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN (edge-gating portals, CSP nonce migration, rate-limiting); this single missing secret is now the biggest single lever on the security + performance sub-scores.
ignisNote: Biggest value came not from code quantity but from surgically removing one misplaced homepage section — audit discipline was the highest-leverage move of the session.
